solution.name: Modern SP Military Org Chart by TehGoodLivin

shortDescription.default: Modern SP Military Org Chart by TehGoodLivin

longDescription.default: A fully configurable SharePoint Organization Chart web part. Displays military hierarchy from a SharePoint list with customizable colors, column mappings, a detail side panel, unit filtering, and full-width support on modern pages. Note: if a list item contains a circular manager reference (e.g. a person set as their own subordinate), that entry will be safely skipped to prevent display errors.

features.title: tgl-sp-military-org-chart Feature
features.description: The feature that activates elements of the tgl-sp-military-org-chart solution.
